title: Builds API reference
excerpt: description: Learn how to programmatically trigger builds, manage triggers, and monitor your Workers Builds using the API. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. This guide shows you how to use the [Workers Builds REST API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/api/resources/workers%5Fbuilds/) to programmatically trigger builds, manage triggers, and monitor build status. The examples use `curl` commands that you can run directly in your terminal or adapt to your preferred programming language.…
